title: OBML Query
description: Query format for the OrionBelt Semantic Layer

queryFilter.description: A filter condition. WHERE filters reference a dimension name or a qualified column (DataObject.Column); HAVING filters reference a measure name. The data object must be reachable from the query's join graph (auto-joined if needed).

field.description: Dimension name, qualified column as DataObject.Column (for WHERE), or measure name (for HAVING)

queryFilterGroup.description: A group of query filters combined with AND or OR logic. Supports recursive nesting for complex boolean expressions.

logic.description: Boolean combination logic for child filters

filters.description: Child filters (leaf filters or nested filter groups)

negated.description: When true, negates the entire group: NOT (filter1 AND/OR filter2)

queryOrderBy.description: Order-by clause. In aggregate mode the field must reference a dimension or measure in the query's SELECT; in raw mode it must reference a 'DataObject.Column' alias from select.fields. Numeric positions (1-based) are accepted in both modes.

field.description: Aggregate mode: dimension/measure name. Raw mode: 'DataObject.Column' alias from select.fields. Either: numeric position (e.g. "1").

querySelect.description: The SELECT part. Two mutually exclusive modes: aggregate mode uses 'dimensions' + 'measures' (GROUP BY + aggregates); raw mode uses 'fields' for un-aggregated row-level projection of physical columns. 'distinct' is only valid in raw mode and 'having' is rejected in raw mode.

dimensions.description: Aggregate mode. List of dimension names (string) or coalesce groups. Use 'name:grain' notation for time grain (e.g. 'Order Date:month'). Mutually exclusive with 'fields'.

measures.description: Aggregate mode. List of measure or metric names. Mutually exclusive with 'fields'.

fields.description: Raw mode. List of qualified physical-column references in 'DataObject.Column' form. Returns un-aggregated rows; no GROUP BY is emitted. Mutually exclusive with 'dimensions', 'measures', and 'having'.

distinct.description: Raw mode only. Emit SELECT DISTINCT to deduplicate rows. Ignored (and rejected) in aggregate mode.

coalesceDimension.description: Combines multiple role-playing dimensions into a single output column via COALESCE. All members must resolve to the same abstract column type. The 'as' alias must be unique within the query and must not collide with an existing model dimension or measure name.

coalesce.description: Two or more dimension names to coalesce, in priority order (first non-null wins).

as.description: Output column alias. Used in SELECT and GROUP BY of the outer wrapper.

usePathName.description: Selects a named secondary join path for a specific (source, target) pair

pathName.description: Name of the secondary join path

where.description: Filters applied before aggregation (WHERE clause). Supports leaf filters and filter groups with AND/OR/NOT logic. Top-level items are combined with AND.

having.description: Filters applied after aggregation (HAVING clause). Supports leaf filters and filter groups with AND/OR/NOT logic. Top-level items are combined with AND.

limit.description: Maximum number of rows to return

offset.description: Number of rows to skip before returning results

usePathNames.description: Override default join paths with named secondary join paths

dimensionsExclude.description: When true, returns dimension value combinations that do NOT exist in the data (anti-join via EXCEPT). Requires 2+ dimensions on independent branches and no measures.
